summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Financial Bull 3X ETF (FAS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Financial Select Sector index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to a market cap-weighted index of US large-cap financial companies. FAS was launched on Nov 6, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.

holdings.infoBox: FAS is an equity ETF with a total of 95 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 24.73%, Berkshire Hathaway at 7.33%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 7.14%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 4.72%, and Visa Inc. at 4.68%.
